streams.pump_role: single feed stream containing all reagents premixed
streams.reasoning: From Chemistry Plan stream_logic: single stream with all components premixed is safe since reaction only initiates at 120°C. Phenylacetylene concentration ~0.5 M matches batch conditions.

mixing_order_reasoning: From Chemistry Plan: No mixing order constraints. Single stream eliminates need for mixer. All components are stable together at room temperature in DES.
chemistry_notes: Thermal 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition in deep eutectic solvent. Key design decisions: (1) Single stream approach based on Chemistry Plan - no premature reaction at RT, (2) 60 min residence time from analogies vs 15 min batch time - longer residence needed in flow for complete nitrile oxide generation and cycloaddition, (3) 5 bar BPR required per calculations to prevent DES component volatilization at 120°C, (4) 1.0 mm ID tubing to handle viscous DES while maintaining good heat transfer, (5) PFA tubing for high temperature compatibility and chemical inertness to DES.

reasoning_per_field.residence_time_min: Calculation estimated 60.0 min (range 1.0-90.0 min). Analogy 3 used 20 min for [3+2] cycloaddition but at lower temperature (60°C vs 120°C). Using 60 min to ensure complete nitrile oxide generation which is rate-limiting per Chemistry Plan.
reasoning_per_field.flow_rate_mL_min: Calculation: V_R/τ = 30.0 mL / 60.0 min = 0.5 mL/min. Matches calculation result exactly.
reasoning_per_field.temperature_C: Same as batch (120°C) - required for thermal nitrile oxide generation per Chemistry Plan. No adjustment needed.
reasoning_per_field.concentration_M: Same as batch (0.5 M phenylacetylene). Analogy 1 used 0.5 M successfully. Direct transfer appropriate.
reasoning_per_field.BPR_bar: Calculation required 5.0 bar for gas-liquid system. DES components have moderate volatility at 120°C requiring pressure maintenance.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_type: Coil reactor per Chemistry Plan stage 1. Analogies 1-2 used coil/tubular reactors successfully for thermal reactions.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_material: PFA for high temperature (120°C) and chemical compatibility with DES. Analogy 1 used steel but PFA preferred for DES to avoid corrosion.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_ID_mm: 1.0 mm per calculation (d = 1.00 mm). Balances heat transfer with pressure drop for viscous DES. Larger than typical 0.5 mm to handle DES viscosity.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_volume_mL: 30.0 mL per calculation (V_R = 30.00 mL). Analogy 1 used 30 mL steel coil - directly applicable volume.
reasoning_per_field.light_setup: Empty string - thermal reaction per Chemistry Plan, no photochemistry involved.
reasoning_per_field.wavelength_nm: null - no light required for thermal cycloaddition
reasoning_per_field.deoxygenation_method: null - Chemistry Plan states not oxygen sensitive, reaction proceeds in air
